selections.name: Cant Stop Munnings
selections.reason: Boasts the highest overall speed figure (105) in the field and drops from a strong maiden optional claiming event at Gulfstream Park.

selections.name: C Mcgriff
selections.reason: Carries a massive 110 class rating shipping in from Oaklawn Park. Jockey change to Beschizza doesn't deter from his strong closing kick.

selections.name: Different Gravy
selections.reason: Consistent Fair Grounds shipper with a 104 speed figure. Should get a favorable stalking trip.

selections.name: Nogradi
selections.reason: Won last out at Parx but faces a class test shipping to Tier 1 Churchill Downs.

danger_horse.name: Bourbon Flight
danger_horse.reason: Irad Ortiz takes the mount; dangerous connections that can never be ignored.

selections.name: Cardio Cat
selections.reason: First-time starter for Steve Asmussen with Irad Ortiz aboard. This trainer/jockey combo is lethal in 2yo maiden sprints.

selections.name: Go New York Go
selections.reason: Showing solid morning workouts at Payson Park; Luis Saez is an aggressive gate rider.

selections.name: Storm Diva
selections.reason: Mark Casse trainee with Jose Ortiz. Has the pedigree to fire early.

selections.name: Valkyrie
selections.reason: Kenny McPeek can have them ready to run early; Declan Cannon rides.

danger_horse.name: Respected Mind
danger_horse.reason: Has the advantage of race experience after a 4th place finish at Keeneland.

selections.name: State Charmer
selections.reason: Top speed figure (99) and class rating (91). Drops into maiden claiming company and gets Luis Saez from an outside draw.

selections.name: Baby Hello
selections.reason: Flashed a 104 speed figure on the turf at Fair Grounds; dangerous if that form translates to the main track.

selections.name: Will Believe
selections.reason: Taking a significant class drop from Maiden Special Weight to Maiden Claiming.

selections.name: Rocky World
selections.reason: Fits well at this level and has posted consistent mid-80s speed figures.

danger_horse.name: Betty Who
danger_horse.reason: Has shown early speed in the past and could hold on for a piece of the exotics.

selections.name: Epic Summer
selections.reason: Massive class drop from an $83k Allowance Optional Claimer down to $40k claiming. Luis Saez takes over and should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Mischief Mania
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz rides for Ed Moger Jr. Has a strong 103 class rating and consistent form.

selections.name: Perfect Audible
selections.reason: Steve Asmussen trainee dropping in class. Jose Ortiz in the irons makes him a major threat.

selections.name: Kid Twist
selections.reason: Consistent figures and a 107 class rating; should be passing tired horses late.

danger_horse.name: Versed
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could hit the board at a price if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Calling On Heaven
selections.reason: Standout 105 speed figure in a weak $12.5k maiden claimer. Tyler Gaffalione riding is a huge positive.

selections.name: Richeztoo
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 102 speed figure. Should be forwardly placed from the inside draw.

selections.name: Grab The Spark
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz takes the mount for Ron Moquett; outside draw keeps him out of trouble.

selections.name: Impavido
selections.reason: Lightly raced and gets Luis Saez; has room to improve second time out.

danger_horse.name: Cause Ima Boss
danger_horse.reason: Has some back class and could wake up at a price.

selections.name: Run Curtis Run
selections.reason: Boasts a massive 122 speed figure and drops from graded stakes company. Gaffalione should get a perfect trip.

selections.name: Step Forward
selections.reason: Strong recent form with a 120 speed figure. Jose Ortiz takes over and will be flying late.

selections.name: Golden Afternoon
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz rides; has a 113 class rating and saves ground from the rail.

selections.name: Sine Qua Non
selections.reason: Consistent turf sprinter with a 117 speed figure; Luis Saez fits his running style perfectly.

danger_horse.name: Autodrive
danger_horse.reason: Good class rating (113) and can stalk the pace effectively.

selections.name: Sweet Bebsi
selections.reason: Top class (98) and speed (99) combination. Irad Ortiz riding is the deciding factor in a competitive field.

selections.name: Sound The Siren
selections.reason: Posted a high 103 speed figure recently; dangerous if she replicates that effort.

selections.name: Ride The Broom
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 95 speed figure; should get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: Waffle House Gang
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps her clean; good recent form makes her a logical exotics piece.

danger_horse.name: Mamarsha
danger_horse.reason: Won last out and is in winning form, though facing tougher here.

selections.name: Stompin Grapes
selections.reason: Top speed figure (109) and strong form. The 1 1/4 mile distance should suit his grinding style perfectly.

selections.name: Tiernanogue
selections.reason: Improving with every start; Gaffalione rides and the 106 speed figure puts him right in the mix.

selections.name: Direct Strike
selections.reason: Brad Cox trainee with Irad Ortiz aboard. Has a 101 speed figure and will relish the distance.

selections.name: Silver Shot
selections.reason: Asmussen and Jose Ortiz team up; 103 speed figure makes him a major player.

danger_horse.name: King Of Heat
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and a 107 speed figure; could get brave if left alone on the lead.

selections.name: Midway Memories
selections.reason: Top class (111) and speed (114) figures. Irad Ortiz rides from the rail, ensuring a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Olivia Valentina
selections.reason: Boasts the highest speed figure in the field (119); will be a major threat in the stretch.

selections.name: Snipsnippitysnip
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 109 speed figure; Gaffalione is an excellent turf rider.

selections.name: Brilliantly
selections.reason: Bob Baffert trainee with a 112 class edge. Martin Garcia takes over and should have her forwardly placed.

danger_horse.name: Faithful Departed
danger_horse.reason: Jose Ortiz rides; improving form and a 106 speed figure makes her a live longshot.
